text:
🐶 Hey Little Lion Social Club🐾
 We’ve missed you! It’s time for our 5th Shih-Tzu and small friends meetup for Valentine’s Day weekend, so please join us for SHIH-TZU TINES <3
 📅 Date: Sunday, February 11th ⏰ Time: 10 am - 12 pm 🐶Where: West Hollywood Small Dog Park
 DETAILS:
 🐾 What happens at our meetups? 
Our adorable Shih Tzus do their thing – playing, sniffing, demanding barking, and making new friends. Meanwhile, humans swap stories, laughs, and maybe even doggie parenting tips! 
📝 Considering recent health concerns in the dog community, if your Shih Tzu has been coughing or showing signs of illness, we kindly ask that you stay home this time to ensure the well-being of all our furry friends. 
🐾 Join us as we celebrate our love for Shih Tzus – a day filled with joy, camaraderie, and the boundless love our furry companions bring to our lives. There is no need to be formal – bring your pup, a smile, and a chill vibe. It’s all about enjoying the company of our furry pals and fellow dog lovers. 
🎫 Please RSVP via Meetup if you’re coming, the link is in our bio – we’d love to know how many treats to pack! 
And hey, if you’re new or feeling anxious about coming solo, don’t worry - we’re a friendly, inclusive bunch and look forward to welcoming you and your pup <3 Lots of people have made new friends and connections from this meetup - Shih Tzu people are truly the best!
 Hope to see you at Shih-TzuTines Meetup 🐾💕
 Mya, Chris, Suki and Lola
